summary: Iteration 27: Verified 29 Vitest unit tests (2 files: constants.test.js + mappers.test.js), Messages.jsx pagination feature (hasMoreMessages/loadMoreMessages/Load More button), compose + reply flows, and regression for Dashboard, Schedule, Management pages. All tests pass. Zero regressions.

test_results.vitest_unit_tests: PASS — 29/29 tests pass (12 in constants.test.js, 17 in mappers.test.js). `yarn test` exits 0 in 0.95s
test_results.constants_test: PASS — All 6 enums (ROLES, GAME_STATUS, ASSIGNMENT_STATUS, CONNECTION_STATUS, NOTIFICATION_TYPES, PAYMENT_STATUS) verified: correct string values + Object.isFrozen()
test_results.mappers_test: PASS — All 8 pure mapper functions verified: mapProfile, mapConnection, mapGame, mapTournament, mapPayment, mapMessage, mapAvailability, mapGameReport with field mapping, defaults, and edge cases
test_results.messages_page_loads: PASS — /messages loads with Inbox, search bar (data-testid='messages-search-input'), New Message button (data-testid='messages-new-message-button'), 7 messages in inbox, '4 new' unread badge
test_results.messages_compose_flow: PASS — Click New Message → compose form opens with recipient dropdown (3 options), subject input, body textarea, Send Message button → after send, compose closes + 'Message Sent! Your message has been sent successfully.' toast shown → message appears in inbox
test_results.messages_reply_flow: PASS — Click inbox message → message detail shown → Reply button (data-testid='messages-reply-button') visible → click Reply → compose opens in reply mode with 'Re: Test Subject from T1 Agent' pre-filled → fill body → send → reply sent successfully
test_results.messages_load_more_button_logic: PASS — data-testid='messages-load-more-button' correctly NOT present when hasMoreMessages=false (9 messages < 50 PAGE_SIZE threshold). Button correctly hidden when searchTerm is non-empty (verified by filling search bar and confirming button absent). Conditional logic in Messages.jsx is sound: {hasMoreMessages && !searchTerm && <Button data-testid='messages-load-more-button'>}
test_results.DataContext_exposes_hasMoreMessages: PASS — DataContext.jsx correctly destructures hasMoreMessages + loadMoreMessages from useDataFetching and exposes them in context value. Messages.jsx correctly destructures these from useData()
test_results.useDataFetching_pagination: PASS — hasMoreMessages set to (messages.length === 50). loadMoreMessages callback calls fetchMoreMessages with oldest message timestamp. firestoreService.js fetchMoreMessages uses startAfter(afterTimestamp) + limit(50) correctly
test_results.no_js_errors_messages_page: PASS — Zero application-level JS errors on Messages page. Only expected Firebase Analytics 'Failed to fetch' (Google Analytics headless env) and Firestore 'AbortError: signal is aborted without reason' (Firestore listener cleanup on navigation — benign)
test_results.regression_dashboard: PASS — /dashboard loads 'Welcome back, Demo Manager' with GAMES THIS MONTH: 5, TOTAL EARNINGS: 75.00, PENDING PAYMENTS: 0, RATING: 4.9, Upcoming Games, Recent Payments sections
test_results.regression_schedule: PASS — /schedule loads 'Game Schedule' with multiple games (Capital Cougars vs Southside Rockets, Metro Eagles vs Northside Lions, etc.) with Assign buttons
test_results.regression_manager: PASS — /manager loads 'League Management' with Tournaments tab showing Spring Showcase Classic + Summer Prep Jam, Assignments/Roster/Referees/Availability/Leaderboard/Standings/Reports tabs

code_review.constants.js: PASS — All 6 enums with Object.freeze() — matches test expectations exactly
code_review.mappers.js: PASS — All 8 pure mapper functions with correct field mappings and safe defaults
code_review.Messages.jsx: PASS — Correctly destructures hasMoreMessages + loadMoreMessages from useData(). Load More button renders at bottom of CardContent inside flex-shrink-0 div, correctly guarded by {hasMoreMessages && !searchTerm}. data-testid='messages-load-more-button' present. disabled={refreshing} during loading. loadMoreMessages called with (messages, referees, managerProfiles) args matching useDataFetching signature
code_review.DataContext.jsx: PASS — hasMoreMessages + loadMoreMessages destructured from useDataFetching and included in context value object
code_review.useDataFetching.js: PASS — hasMoreMessages state initialized false. fetchData sets hasMoreMessages=(data.messages.length === MESSAGE_PAGE_SIZE). loadMoreMessages callback fetches next page via fetchMoreMessages, appends to messages state, updates hasMoreMessages. Both exported in return object
code_review.firestoreService.js: PASS — fetchMoreMessages function present at bottom, uses startAfter(afterTimestamp) + limit(50) for cursor-based pagination. Returns mapped messages via safeHandle wrapper

success_rate.backend: N/A (100% Firebase Firestore — no FastAPI backend)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (13/13 test scenarios pass, 29/29 unit tests pass)

seed_data_creation: None — 2 test messages created during testing: 'Test Subject from T1 Agent' (new compose) and 'Re: Test Subject from T1 Agent' (reply)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 27 all green. 29 Vitest unit tests pass (constants.test.js 12 tests + mappers.test.js 17 tests). Messages pagination feature verified: hasMoreMessages/loadMoreMessages in DataContext, messages-load-more-button conditionally renders only when hasMoreMessages=true AND searchTerm is empty. Compose + reply flows confirmed working with 'Message Sent!' toast. Dashboard/Schedule/Management regressions all clean. Only console noise is Firebase Analytics fetch errors (headless env, benign) and Firestore AbortError on navigation (listener cleanup, benign).
rca_of_issues: N/A — No bugs found. All new features and unit tests verified correctly.
